title: Rol (disambiguation)
content:
'''Rol''' may refer to one of the following:

*The '''[[Rol system/Legends|Rol system]]'''
**'''[[Rol Two]], a celestial body in the Rol [[Star system/Legends|system]]
*[[Rol (Human)|'''Rol''']], a [[Human/Legends|Human]]
*'''[[Rol Stone]]''', a type of [[Gemstone/Legends|gemstone]]
